{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032314063858BA367F9A6D856A9162"}"},"total":3158},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7264406392207311674","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我简直太爱了，这是我看过最好的末世天灾文，没有之一，大宝和福丫，还有那几只动物伙伴，我真的超级爱，还有遇上的这波人也不错，真的是真的是，我太喜欢～(￣▽￣～)~","text_exts":[{"e":19,"s":15,"text":"末世天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9C%AB%E4%B8%96%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774245998856A9162%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227264406392207311674%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227254806799562312760%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9C%AB%E4%B8%96%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691376558,"group_id":"7254806799562312760","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"简简单单一人，平平淡淡","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NznhLkTVq9iqZQ/E23qsfo9CgKdPFWxhoYsZ1nl+PYbj","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2e4946c254734ccba96f6e4c75929f54~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794572&x-signature=NBbHG6QD7arjq%2FwlX06hVoLGkbc%3D","user_id":"2524093010156344","user_name":"落木生华Mori"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2524093010156344","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7254806799562312760","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+重生+萌兽+空间+杀伐果断+无CP女强+兽语】
末世生存不易，宁珂十年间吃亏受伤无数，可就在即将上岸时却惨遭背刺。
再睁眼，她不仅重回末世初期，前世的空间及物资也一并随她重生。
凭借前世记忆，斩仇人，抢机缘，有恩报恩，有仇报仇；
仗着无限空间疯狂敛财囤物资；
从此踏上另一条人生轨迹，好运与危机并存，她的身边开始聚集各类变异萌兽。
从橘猫到国宝，地上跑的，天上飞的，甚至水里游的……
傲娇的、可爱的、毒舌的、护短的……
末世无情，觉醒兽语异能的宁珂却深陷萌兽们的无限宠爱中无法自拔。
熊猫崽福丫：【姐姐，你好香！】
熊猫妈妈大宝：【宁宁别怕。】
橘猫橘子：【宁宁是我的。】
皇女蜂蜂妞：宁宁由我守护。
宁珂看着围绕身边的毛绒绒们露出幸福笑容，别人的末世艰难困苦，她被一群萌兽宠上天；
在属于她的领地中，喝着蜂蜜奶茶，吃着坚果烤着炭火，日子安心又惬意。
……
这一世她实力强劲走暗线，默默与国合作，为了上一世的温暖，也因为：有国才有家！
她的信条：人不犯我我不犯人，人若犯我必杀之！
无论路有多艰难，她都会与萌兽小伙伴们并肩作战，只为努力活下去。
